official_degree_name: Executive Master in Health Care Leadership (EMHCL)
program_description: Online executive master's program in health care leadership hosted by the Health Management and Policy Department.
notes: The department page says HMPD hosts the EMHCL, and the landing page labels it as an online graduate academic program. No credit or duration information was published on the official public page.

program_description: Graduate public health program at FHS with public-health training and CEPH accreditation history.
accreditation: Council on Education for Public Health (CEPH) accreditation referenced on the page.
notes: The public page did not render the degree title in text, so the official degree name remains null.

official_degree_name: Master of Public Health
duration: Minimum 2 years full-time; up to 4 years part-time
program_description: Professional Master of Public Health degree within the Graduate Public Health Program.
admission_requirements: Good academic record; English proficiency required; no GRE required.
notes: The brochure says the MPH totals 42 credits and lists the three concentrations above. It also states that full-time students generally need a minimum of two years and part-time students up to four years.

official_degree_name: Master of Science in Environmental Sciences
duration: Normally completed over two years full-time
program_description: Interfaculty Master of Science degree in Environmental Sciences with a major in Environmental Health.
admission_requirements: Open to students from all undergraduate backgrounds; English proficiency required; no GRE required.

tuition.category: Faculty of Health Sciences Graduate Tuition

sources.page_title: Master of Science in Environmental Sciences
Master of Science in Environmental Sciences Brochure

notes: The brochure says the degree consists of 30 credits, including a thesis/project component of 6 or 3 credits. It also states that the program is offered within the Interfaculty Graduate Environmental Sciences Program. Normalized thesis_or_non_thesis from "Thesis or project".

official_degree_name: Master of Science in Biochemistry
program_description: Graduate program in biochemistry under the Faculty of Medicine's biomedical sciences umbrella.
notes: The department page states the MS is thesis-based and requires 21 credits of graduate coursework plus a 9-credit thesis. Normalized thesis_or_non_thesis from "Thesis".

official_degree_name: Master of Science in Microbiology and Immunology
program_description: Graduate program in microbiology and immunology under the Graduate Studies in Biomedical Sciences umbrella.
notes: The department page states this MS is offered under the umbrella of the Graduate Studies in Biomedical Sciences. Normalized thesis_or_non_thesis from "Thesis".

official_degree_name: Doctor of Philosophy in Biomedical Sciences
duration: At least three years beyond the master's degree; five-year completion limit
program_description: Doctoral program in biomedical sciences offering discipline-specific thesis work within the Faculty of Medicine.
notes: The AUB catalogue also lists Biomedical Engineering and Nutrition as DBMS disciplines, but they are omitted here because this file is limited to Faculty of Medicine graduate programs. Normalized thesis_or_non_thesis from "Thesis".

official_degree_name: Master of Science in Pharmacology and Therapeutics
program_description: Graduate program in pharmacology and therapeutics under the Graduate Studies in Biomedical Sciences umbrella.
notes: The department page states this MS is offered under the umbrella of the Graduate Studies in Biomedical Sciences. Normalized thesis_or_non_thesis from "Thesis".

notes: The page also offers a PhD degree; see the sibling record. Also appears in research/aub/programs.json; AUB describes it as a joint interdisciplinary graduate program between MSFEA and the Faculty of Medicine. Cross-listed/interfaculty program; also appeared in interfaculty_programs.json.
